New York City faces significant challenges as subway services are disrupted during rush hour, judges impose new hurdles for low-income tenants, and violence against the homeless persists, while environmental activists push for Rikers Island reforms and the administration seeks to amend climate targets without legislative approval.

### Risks & Alerts

- Subway service disrupted on many lines due to various issues during evening rush hour. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- New York judges add new obstacle for low-income tenants with housing vouchers.
